specific_question: What internal compliance Key Performance Indicator (KPI) has MediConn introduced to measure readiness for Indigenous reporting by FY2026?
answer: MediConn introduced an internal KPI called the "Indigenous Reporting Readiness Index (IRRI)", targeting 85% framework compliance and 100% staff retraining completion by Q4 2026.
justification: This internal KPI provides measurable progress tracking toward compliance integration and staff cultural competency goals.
dr_question: What additional compliance controls should be integrated into MediConn’s platform by Q2 2026 to ensure secure authentication and patient verification for Indigenous patients in low-connectivity environments?
